# services.readarr

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.readarr`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.readarr.dataDir` | `string` | The directory where Readarr stores its data files. |
| `services.readarr.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Readarr, a Usenet/BitTorrent ebook downloader. |
| `services.readarr.environmentFiles` | `list of absolute path` | Environment file to pass secret configuration values. Each line must follow the `READARR__SECTION__KEY=value` pattern. Please consult the documentation at the [wiki](https://wiki.servarr.com/useful-tools#using-environment-variables-for-config). |
| `services.readarr.group` | `string` | Group under which Readarr runs. |
| `services.readarr.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Open ports in the firewall for Readarr |
| `services.readarr.package` | `package` | The readarr package to use. |
| `services.readarr.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of section of an INI file (attrs of INI atom (null, bool, int, float or string))` | Attribute set of arbitrary config options. Please consult the documentation at the [wiki](https://wiki.servarr.com/useful-tools#using-environment-variables-for-config). WARNING: this configuration is stored in the world-readable Nix store! For secrets use [](#opt-services.readarr.environmentFiles). |
| `services.readarr.settings.log.analyticsEnabled` | `boolean` | Send Anonymous Usage Data |
| `services.readarr.settings.server.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port Number |
| `services.readarr.settings.update.automatically` | `boolean` | Automatically download and install updates. |
| `services.readarr.settings.update.mechanism` | `null or one of "external", "builtIn", "script"` | which update mechanism to use |
| `services.readarr.user` | `string` | User account under which Readarr runs. |
